intro: Master the battlefield or fall in the chaos.
description:
You wake up in a dangerous zone where survival is the only rule. Waves of armed enemies attack without mercy, and one wrong move can end your run. Fight smart, use the environment, and prove you have what it takes to escape. Each run is a test of skill and awareness. One mistake can end everything. Learn enemy patterns, control the battlefield, and prove you have what it takes to escape.

Key Features:
• Wave-based combat with relentless enemies
• Fast-paced firefights on an optimized, action-focused map
• Ranged enemies with custom AI and tactical shooting behavior
• Loot pickups (armor, health, grenades) to keep you in the fight
• Responsive movement and shooting mechanics for precise control

Escape is never guaranteed. Learn the battlefield, adapt to every wave, and fight until the last moment. Only skill keeps you alive.
